content.problemStatement: Danya gave integers aaa, bbb and nnn to Archi. Archi wants to compare ana^nan and bnb^nbn. Help Archi with this task.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains three space-separated integers aaa, bbb and nnn.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer: 111 if an>bna^n > b^nan>bn, 222 if an<bna^n < b^nan<bn or 000 if an=bna^n = b^nan=bn.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: an=243a^n = 243an=243 and bn=1024b^n = 1024bn=1024.
Example case 2: an=81a^n = 81an=81 and bn=16b^n = 16bn=16.
